name: Pahlawan Cosplay
overview:
"Where am I... wasn't I just on the battlefield fighting enemies?"

A battle sends an ancient warrior through a time rift to the Golden Triangle in Kuala Lumpur! Dressed in armor, he is bewildered by everything around him, only to be unexpectedly idolized by a cosplay enthusiast. Can he adapt to this strange world? What deeper secrets lie behind this time-traveling story?

trailers.title: Pahlawan Cosplay - Hanya di Do Drama
